$schema: Locale strings keyed by an i18n key. Used by the admin UI script — drop new files like strings.fr.json and they'll be picked up automatically.
header.title: Projectionist
header.tagline: Plays preroll videos before movies and episodes. Folder-based — no Jellyfin library required.
section.source.hint: Folder Projectionist scans for preroll video files. Read-only.
section.triggers.hint: Which content types kick off a preroll.
section.selection.hint: How prerolls are picked from the pool.
section.smart.hint: Cooldowns, resume detection, maturity gating, per-user rules.
section.advanced.hint: Multiple folders, per-library rules, schedules, trailer mode, series-specific prerolls.
section.library.hint: Jellyfin's player needs library items to stream. Projectionist creates a hidden library at your folder.
